playbook.intent: Half-day reflective task before promotion cycle → written case mapping last 6 months at the shop to senior/lead competency rubric, with evidence reviewer can verify.
playbook.scope: Atomic half-day ceremony repeated each promotion cycle. Output: a written case that maps the last 6 months to the senior/lead competency rubric, with evidence the reviewer can verify without you in the room. Used at outsource shops where promotion is calibrated against an internal rubric.

success-criteria.criterion: Every rubric line has at least one evidence link
Case is self-contained for an off-engagement reviewer

stage.name: Inventory + rubric mapping
stage.intent: Match what you did to what HR scores you on.

tasks.task: List engagements over the last 6 months
Map evidence to each rubric line
Build a 30-60-90 forward plan to show direction

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when every rubric line has evidence or an honest 'gap' note.

stage.name: STAR stories
stage.intent: Tell 3 stories that survive a reviewer's stress-test.

tasks.task: Frame each in STAR (Situation, Task, Action, Result)
Apply storytelling patterns to keep them readable
Lessons-learned style: what you'd do differently

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when stories land impact in numbers, not adjectives.

stage.name: Peer feedback + filing
stage.intent: Triangulate the self-narrative with external voices.

tasks.task: Solicit feedback from ≥3 peers using a tested script
Apply feedback patterns to integrate critique
File with HR + your manager before the deadline

stage.decision-gate: Done when case is filed AND each peer quote is verifiable.

extra.value: [Salary negotiation — that's a separate conversation, Building a new portfolio — uses what already exists, 'Reviewer politics — focused on evidence, not games']
[Competency rubric accessible from HR, Last 6 months of engagement artifacts retrievable, Peer-feedback pool willing to be contacted]

[Self-narrative without peer triangulation — reviewer discounts it, Adjectives instead of metrics — stories evaporate at panel review, 'Filing without a forward plan — reviewers want direction, not just history']
['Could a reviewer verify every claim without me in the room?', 'Did I show a stretch goal, not just achievements?', 'Did I solicit feedback from people who''d push back?']

{human: faion get-content senior-promotion-case-prep --format md, agent: faion get-content senior-promotion-case-prep --format context, json: faion get-content senior-promotion-case-prep --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial draft for F-064 P4 outsource-specialist persona, atomic angle'}]
